global.description: The ad features a modern design with a blue background and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple service with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Blue background with shapes
elements.description: A solid blue background featuring a large rectangle and a smaller circle, creating a modern and abstract feel.

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: The logo 'CoinBridge' is displayed prominently in a bold, modern font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle positioned towards the bottom left, adding a decorative touch to the overall design.

elements.label: Secure & simple message
elements.description: The text 'Secure & simple No hidden fees' is presented in a large, clear font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Start now button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Start now' in a bold font, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in a bright color, drawing attention.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
